title: Ticker Fundamentals
description: Ten years of price, valuation, and fundamentals for a single ticker, computed via the equity_metric_series view (migrations 0002-0012).

list.name: ticker
list.label: Ticker
list.query: SELECT i.symbol FROM instruments i WHERE i.kind = 'equity' AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM fundamentals f WHERE f.instrument_id = i.id) ORDER BY i.symbol
list.definition: SELECT i.symbol FROM instruments i WHERE i.kind = 'equity' AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM fundamentals f WHERE f.instrument_id = i.id) ORDER BY i.symbol

list.name: display_currency
list.label: Currency
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT split_part(unit, '/', 1) AS currency FROM fundamentals WHERE unit ~ '^[A-Z]{3}(/shares)?$' UNION SELECT currency FROM instruments ORDER BY 1
list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT split_part(unit, '/', 1) AS currency FROM fundamentals WHERE unit ~ '^[A-Z]{3}(/shares)?$' UNION SELECT currency FROM instruments ORDER BY 1

list.name: candle_interval
list.label: Candles
list.query: Daily : day, Weekly : week, Monthly : month

list.name: metric_left
list.label: Left axis
list.query: Price : price, P/E : pe, P/FCF : pfcf, P/B : pb, EV/EBITDA : ev_ebitda, EPS : eps, Revenue : revenue, Earnings : earnings, Gross margin : gross_margin, Operating margin : op_margin, Total debt : debt, Debt-to-Equity : de, MCap : mcap, Shares outstanding : shares

list.name: metric_right
list.label: Right axis
list.query: Price : price, P/E : pe, P/FCF : pfcf, P/B : pb, EV/EBITDA : ev_ebitda, EPS : eps, Revenue : revenue, Earnings : earnings, Gross margin : gross_margin, Operating margin : op_margin, Total debt : debt, Debt-to-Equity : de, MCap : mcap, Shares outstanding : shares

panels.title: $ticker — Price ($candle_interval candles, $display_currency)
panels.description: Daily price as OHLC candles, converted to the selected display currency and aggregated into the candle size chosen with the 'Candles' selector (daily / weekly / monthly), with 50- and 200-period simple moving averages of the close. The SMAs share the candles' price axis (no second axis) and their latest and mean values show in the legend.

targets.rawSql: WITH daily AS (SELECT date_trunc('$candle_interval', p.date)::timestamptz AS bucket, p.date, COALESCE(p.open, p.close)::float8 * COALESCE(ff.usd_rate / NULLIF(ft.usd_rate, 0), 1) AS o, COALESCE(p.high, p.close)::float8 * COALESCE(ff.usd_rate / NULLIF(ft.usd_rate, 0), 1) AS h, COALESCE(p.low, p.close)::float8 * COALESCE(ff.usd_rate / NULLIF(ft.usd_rate, 0), 1) AS l, p.close::float8 * COALESCE(ff.usd_rate / NULLIF(ft.usd_rate, 0), 1) AS c FROM prices p JOIN instruments i ON i.id = p.instrument_id LEFT JOIN fx_usd_daily ff ON ff.currency = i.currency AND ff.date = p.date LEFT JOIN fx_usd_daily ft ON ft.currency = '$display_currency' AND ft.date = p.date WHERE i.symbol = '$ticker'), candles AS (SELECT bucket AS t, (array_agg(o ORDER BY date ASC))[1] AS o, max(h) AS h, min(l) AS l, (array_agg(c ORDER BY date DESC))[1] AS c FROM daily GROUP BY bucket), sma AS (SELECT t, o, h, l, c, CASE WHEN count(*) OVER w50 = 50 THEN avg(c) OVER w50 END AS sma50, CASE WHEN count(*) OVER w200 = 200 THEN avg(c) OVER w200 END AS sma200 FROM candles WINDOW w50 AS (ORDER BY t ROWS BETWEEN 49 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW), w200 AS (ORDER BY t ROWS BETWEEN 199 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW)) SELECT t AS "time", o AS "open", h AS "high", l AS "low", c AS "close", sma50 AS "SMA50", sma200 AS "SMA200" FROM sma WHERE $__timeFilter(t) ORDER BY t

panels.title: $ticker — $metric_left (left) vs $metric_right (right)
panels.description: Pick any two metrics with the 'Left axis' / 'Right axis' selectors above; each gets its own y-axis scale. The mean of each metric over the selected range is shown in the legend table (Mean column). Quarterly metrics connect across report dates (spanNulls).

targets.rawSql: SELECT s."time", s.label AS metric, s.value * (CASE WHEN s.currency IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE COALESCE(ff.usd_rate / NULLIF(ft.usd_rate, 0), 1) END) AS value FROM equity_metric_series s JOIN instruments i ON i.id = s.instrument_id LEFT JOIN fx_usd_daily ff ON ff.currency = s.currency AND ff.date = s."time"::date LEFT JOIN fx_usd_daily ft ON ft.currency = '$display_currency' AND ft.date = s."time"::date WHERE i.symbol = '$ticker' AND s.metric = '$metric_left' AND $__timeFilter(s."time") ORDER BY 1

SELECT s."time", s.label AS metric, s.value * (CASE WHEN s.currency IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE COALESCE(ff.usd_rate / NULLIF(ft.usd_rate, 0), 1) END) AS value FROM equity_metric_series s JOIN instruments i ON i.id = s.instrument_id LEFT JOIN fx_usd_daily ff ON ff.currency = s.currency AND ff.date = s."time"::date LEFT JOIN fx_usd_daily ft ON ft.currency = '$display_currency' AND ft.date = s."time"::date WHERE i.symbol = '$ticker' AND s.metric = '$metric_right' AND $__timeFilter(s."time") ORDER BY 1

panels.title: P/E (TTM)
panels.description: Daily close divided by trailing-twelve-month diluted EPS (quarterly EPS summed, Q4 derived from the 10-K). No point is drawn while TTM EPS is negative or the last report is older than ~15 months.

targets.rawSql: SELECT s."time", s.label AS metric, s.value FROM equity_metric_series s JOIN instruments i ON i.id = s.instrument_id WHERE i.symbol = '$ticker' AND s.metric = 'pe' AND $__timeFilter(s."time") ORDER BY 1

panels.title: P/FCF (TTM)
panels.description: Market cap (daily close × latest weighted diluted shares) over TTM free cash flow (operating cash flow minus capex). No point is drawn while TTM FCF is negative; missing if the filer doesn't tag capex.

targets.rawSql: SELECT s."time", s.label AS metric, s.value FROM equity_metric_series s JOIN instruments i ON i.id = s.instrument_id WHERE i.symbol = '$ticker' AND s.metric = 'pfcf' AND $__timeFilter(s."time") ORDER BY 1

panels.title: Revenue (TTM) — $display_currency
panels.description: Trailing-twelve-month revenue: one point per reported quarter end (annual filers get one point per fiscal year).

targets.rawSql: SELECT s."time", s.label AS metric, s.value * (CASE WHEN s.currency IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE COALESCE(ff.usd_rate / NULLIF(ft.usd_rate, 0), 1) END) AS value FROM equity_metric_series s JOIN instruments i ON i.id = s.instrument_id LEFT JOIN fx_usd_daily ff ON ff.currency = s.currency AND ff.date = s."time"::date LEFT JOIN fx_usd_daily ft ON ft.currency = '$display_currency' AND ft.date = s."time"::date WHERE i.symbol = '$ticker' AND s.metric = 'revenue' AND $__timeFilter(s."time") ORDER BY 1

panels.title: Earnings (TTM) — $display_currency
panels.description: Trailing-twelve-month net income: one point per reported quarter end (annual filers get one point per fiscal year).

targets.rawSql: SELECT s."time", s.label AS metric, s.value * (CASE WHEN s.currency IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE COALESCE(ff.usd_rate / NULLIF(ft.usd_rate, 0), 1) END) AS value FROM equity_metric_series s JOIN instruments i ON i.id = s.instrument_id LEFT JOIN fx_usd_daily ff ON ff.currency = s.currency AND ff.date = s."time"::date LEFT JOIN fx_usd_daily ft ON ft.currency = '$display_currency' AND ft.date = s."time"::date WHERE i.symbol = '$ticker' AND s.metric = 'earnings' AND $__timeFilter(s."time") ORDER BY 1

panels.title: Gross margin (TTM)
panels.description: Trailing-twelve-month gross profit (revenue minus cost of goods sold) as a percentage of TTM revenue: one point per reported quarter end (annual filers get one point per fiscal year).

targets.rawSql: SELECT s."time", s.label AS metric, s.value FROM equity_metric_series s JOIN instruments i ON i.id = s.instrument_id WHERE i.symbol = '$ticker' AND s.metric = 'gross_margin' AND $__timeFilter(s."time") ORDER BY 1

panels.title: Operating margin (TTM)
panels.description: Trailing-twelve-month operating income as a percentage of TTM revenue: one point per reported quarter end (annual filers get one point per fiscal year).

targets.rawSql: SELECT s."time", s.label AS metric, s.value FROM equity_metric_series s JOIN instruments i ON i.id = s.instrument_id WHERE i.symbol = '$ticker' AND s.metric = 'op_margin' AND $__timeFilter(s."time") ORDER BY 1

panels.title: Total debt — $display_currency
panels.description: Balance-sheet debt at each report date, composed from the components the filer tags (long-term debt incl. current portion, plus short-term borrowings) without double counting.

targets.rawSql: SELECT s."time", s.label AS metric, s.value * (CASE WHEN s.currency IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE COALESCE(ff.usd_rate / NULLIF(ft.usd_rate, 0), 1) END) AS value FROM equity_metric_series s JOIN instruments i ON i.id = s.instrument_id LEFT JOIN fx_usd_daily ff ON ff.currency = s.currency AND ff.date = s."time"::date LEFT JOIN fx_usd_daily ft ON ft.currency = '$display_currency' AND ft.date = s."time"::date WHERE i.symbol = '$ticker' AND s.metric = 'debt' AND $__timeFilter(s."time") ORDER BY 1

panels.title: Shares outstanding
panels.description: Weighted diluted share count from each report (the same series MCap and P/FCF use); a falling line means buybacks, a rising one dilution.

targets.rawSql: SELECT s."time", s.label AS metric, s.value FROM equity_metric_series s JOIN instruments i ON i.id = s.instrument_id WHERE i.symbol = '$ticker' AND s.metric = 'shares' AND $__timeFilter(s."time") ORDER BY 1

panels.title: Ticker requests
panels.description: Type a ticker in the 'Add ticker' box above and press Enter: it is queued here and the app ingests it within a minute or two (full price history, plus SEC fundamentals when the company files with EDGAR). Unknown tickers end as not_found. Rows are kept so requests never repeat; to retry one, delete its row from the ticker_requests table.

targets.rawSql: WITH input AS (SELECT upper(trim(${search:sqlstring})) AS symbol), ins AS (INSERT INTO ticker_requests (symbol) SELECT symbol FROM input WHERE symbol ~ '^[A-Z0-9][A-Z0-9.=-]{0,31}$' AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM instruments i WHERE i.symbol = input.symbol) ON CONFLICT (symbol) DO NOTHING RETURNING symbol) SELECT r.symbol AS "Ticker", r.status AS "Status", coalesce(r.note, '') AS "Note", r.requested_at AS "Requested", r.processed_at AS "Processed" FROM ticker_requests r ORDER BY r.requested_at DESC LIMIT 10
